title: oxalis psilopoda
intro: Oxalis psilopoda, also known as the rock rose or wood sorrel, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Oxalis psilopoda has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as having antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. The plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used in poultices or salves to aid in the treatment of various health issues.
